title: python developer – bank - 12k
description:
about the job. As a Software Engineer within a specialized regulatory reporting division, you will be responsible for developing architecturally sound systems used for global data submission to governing bodies.

  • Design and implement high-quality, scalable technical solutions for complex data processing requirements.

  • Engage in hands-on programming and end-to-end testing to ensure systems meet production standards.

  • Collaborate within an agile framework to define technical direction and simplify complex system ecosystems.

  • Work closely with international stakeholders and cross-functional teams to deliver value-driven business tools.

  • Identify and resolve system bottlenecks while ensuring high performance in a clearing and risk management domain.

skills and experience required.

  • Professional background in commercial software development with a deep proficiency in Python.

  • Strong competency in Linux environments and shell scripting for automation and system management.

  • Experience with cloud-native technologies, application containerization, and modern deployment pipelines.

  • Solid technical knowledge of relational database systems and managing data via structured query languages.

  • Proven ability to operate effectively in an agile setting, utilizing standard version control and project tracking tools.

To apply online please use the apply function, alternatively you may contact Chloe Chen at chloe.chen(@)randstad.com.sg. (EA: 94C3609 /R1768253)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
